message:
test(getopt): convert differential test to standalone conformance

Differential testing against host libc was unreliable due to shared
symbol space - both FrankenLibC and glibc export optind/optarg and
dlsym resolution could not cleanly isolate the host implementation.

Convert to standalone conformance tests that verify FrankenLibC's
getopt/getopt_long against expected POSIX behavior directly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
